title: 有馬記念の後に・憧れの先へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is so incredible, none of us remember to
even breathe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment Fuji Kiseki flies past the finish line
and claims first place, the stands ring with cries of
jubilation.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh! She did it! That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Fuji! We're so unbelievably
proud of you, congraaats!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member B
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the miracle! Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Her audience of thousands hung onto her every
word.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Her every breath and movement was like that of a
dream to them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"Now burn the image of my form upon those
beautiful eyes of yours, dark and deep as the
night!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's that same sight...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(Calm down. I must remain an entertainer until
the very end!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki closes her eyes softly and bows her
head reverentially to the stands.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm incredibly humbled to have the honor of
receiving such a love-filled standing ovation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is the end of the miracles for my senior year,
and it's time for the actors to return to the wings
of the stage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But please, worry not! My tale is not yet over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She spreads her hands wide, and a single firework
shoots into the sky and blooms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My miracle today will continue on into the future,
and I promise to bring it to you all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Goodbye for now! Be well, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She exits her stage, leaving behind the twinkling
sky, and everyone sees her off with eyes full of
admiration.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And thus concludes chapter one.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? I know it in my heart, but I still want to
hear you say it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I was able to become the greatest
entertainer ever?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The audience's cheers for Fuji Kiseki are just as passionate—no, they're even more passionate than the applause her mother received in the play we once watched together.
choice_data_list: You are the greatest entertainer ever.
You are the greatest entertainer ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so happy. If you say so, it must be true.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...There's something I want to get off my chest.
Please pay it no mind, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, a part of me never forgave my
younger self.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The me who failed to achieve true acclaim on the
stage just couldn't let things go.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So, no matter how many times I won, I still didn't
believe in myself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even as I continued down the path of racing, my
younger self was always there.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But right now, I feel like I can finally forgive her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki's mouth curves into a small, shy smile.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is my path... No, that's not it. This is where I
belong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ruby sunset illuminates the profile of her face
as she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns away from me abruptly before I have a
chance to say anything.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, we can't spend forever wallowing in
sentimentality!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The end is just another beginning. Let's start
working toward our next show!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Together, we can go anywhere.
